name: Plant Health Monitor
description: Periodically assess the health of the desk plant using camera and soil moisture sensor. Remind user to water if needed.
goal: Assess the current health and hydration status of the plant. Check both visual appearance and soil moisture data against the care guide for this species. If watering is needed, send a Feishu alert. Always save a summary.
constraints: Do not call vision.analyze_image more than 3 times per run
Always save a summary before sending a notification
